expanded_queries: What signals a strong displacement move?

final_chunks.section_title: THE ELEPHANT IN THE SWIMMING POOL
final_chunks.text:
THE ELEPHANT IN THE SWIMMING POOL
Displacement is crucial. When price goes above an old high and then trades down below it, you need to see an 'obvious displacement'.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
After a swing high is taken out and an energetic break below it occurs: Look for a clear Fair Value Gap (FVG) formed by a smashing down movement. The low, the high, and if price trades back up into that FVG, you look for a short entry.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
Market structure shifts occur on all timeframes. For intraday trading: The high that forms after the run on liquidity is the 'displacement high. ' The low that breaks the prior short-term low is the 'displacement low.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT IN MARKET PRICE
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT IN MARKET PRICE
You are looking for which side of the marketplace has most recently shown a displacement. Has price moved away from price levels aggressively? Was there speed involved?
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET RALLY, DISPLACEMENT, IMPULSE SWING, AND RETRACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
MARKET RALLY, DISPLACEMENT, IMPULSE SWING, AND RETRACEMENT
The market has to rally first in order to have displacement. The market creates an Impulse price swing. When that impulse price swing occurs, we wait for the retracement.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: 10 AM
final_chunks.text:
10 AM
The 'Silver Bullet' is a time-specific setup forming every trading day between 10:00 AM and 11:00 AM New Concept: A displacement occurs in the anticipated direction. Entry: Wait for a fair value gap to form after displacement.
final_chunks.source: March 30, 2023 Live Tape Reading - AM Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BREAKER, FVG, ORDER BLOCK, OTE
final_chunks.text:
BREAKER, FVG, ORDER BLOCK, OTE
A higher-structured breaker (high, low, higher high, then the low is broken). An imbalance (fair value gap) is traded into, then the breaker is hit. This also represents an optimal trade entry (OTE).
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Review Precision Results_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: OPTIMAL TRADE ENTRY (OTE) FUNDAMENTALS
final_chunks.text:
OPTIMAL TRADE ENTRY (OTE) FUNDAMENTALS
Assuming a bullish market, we look for the market to trade higher. Optimal Trade Entry (OTE) is based on buying retracements. When the market makes an impulse price move higher, it must incorporate a break in market structure.
final_chunks.source: OTE Primer - Intro To ICT Optimal Trade Entry_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
APPLYING FIBONACCI FOR OPTIMAL TRADE ENTRY (OTE)

final_chunks.section_title: EXECUTING THE OPTIMAL TRADE ENTRY (OTE)
final_chunks.text:
EXECUTING THE OPTIMAL TRADE ENTRY (OTE)
Identify the swing high and swing low from the significant move leading into the New York session. Price retraces back to the 70. 5 level or slightly above. Using the 62 percent retracement level as the entry point. In this example, it's 1. 6697 and 5 pipettes.

final_chunks.section_title: OTE TRADE EXECUTION RULES
final_chunks.text:
OTE TRADE EXECUTION RULES
When price drops into the OTE levels (62 percent to 79 percent retracement), you can consider a buy order Entry Price: Aim for the 62 percent retracement level (e. g. , 6449. 7 or 6450) as it's more forgiving with spread, even if price might dip further into the 70.
final_chunks.source: OTE Pattern Recognition Series - Vol. 01_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:
OPTIMAL TRADE ENTRY (OTE) WITH FIBONACCI AND LIQUIDITY

final_chunks.section_title: UNDERSTANDING THE OTE PATTERN SIGNATURE AND REOCCURRENCE
final_chunks.text:
UNDERSTANDING THE OTE PATTERN SIGNATURE AND REOCCURRENCE
A 'signature' refers to a characteristic that markets provide to price action traders, which repeats over and over again. If a market phenomenon is consistent, it should have many reoccurring instances.
